description: Add ATR trailing stop (2x ATR below highest close since entry) alongside the existing 2R take-profit exit to lock in gains and reduce drawdown during trend reversals.
Lower ADX threshold from 25→20 to widen entry set and increase trade count.
Remove ADX filter and replace fixed take-profit exit with ATR trailing stop to boost trade frequency while managing risk.
Replace EMA crossover entry with Donchian breakout (20-day high) to increase trade frequency and satisfy min_trades gate.
Replace entry with fast EMA (5/20) crossover and exit with 1x ATR trailing stop to boost trade count from 0 to >20.
Faster EMA crossover (10/30) to boost trade count toward the min_trades gate while retaining ADX quality filter and 2R take-profit exit.
Replace EMA crossover entry with Donchian(5) breakout and ATR trailing stop (1x ATR) to increase trade count and satisfy min_trades gate.
Replace failing Donchian(5) breakout with EMA(10/30) crossover to boost trade count above 20, use 2×ATR trailing stop to limit drawdown, remove ADX filter to widen entry set.
Replace EMA crossover entry with Bollinger band breakout (20,2) + ADX>20 trend filter to boost trade count and improve val_sharpe over prior 0-trade runs.
Switch to Bollinger upper breakout (20,2) entry with ADX>15 trend filter, exit via trailing stop 1.5×ATR below highest high (long) to boost trade count above 20 while capping drawdown.
